description: Import the Titanic passenger dataset into KNIME Analytics Platform and view the imported data. The dataset is located at /home/ga/Documents/data/titanic.csv (891 real historical passenger records with survival data, 12 columns). You are in the KNIME workflow editor with an empty workflow called 'Titanic Analysis'. Add the appropriate data reader node to the workflow, configure it to read the Titanic CSV file, execute the node, and open the output table to view the imported data.
